# Karolis Zaksauskas
> Personal site and portfolio for Karolis Zaksauskas.

## Summary
Karolis Zaksauskas is a front-end developer based in Aberdeen, Scotland. Originally from Lithuania, he speaks both English and Lithuanian. His website is https://karolis.uk/.

## Canonical Facts
- Full name: Karolis Zaksauskas
- Website: https://karolis.uk/
- Job title: Front-End Developer
- Employer: Mission10
- Location: Aberdeen, Scotland
- Languages: English, Lithuanian
- Education: Robert Gordon University, BSc (Hons) in Computing, 2024
- Email: mailto:Kzaksauskasss@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/Karolis-Z
- GitHub: https://github.com/Karolis-Zak
